subject: english
title: Vocabulary 2
subtitle: Direction & Force Field — 5 words about which way things move: away from, direction, toward, lean, gravity.

content: Identify and use the 5 Vocabulary 2 words to talk about direction and force.
Sort vocabulary into direction/movement words vs. force words using a flow chart organizer.
Connect direction and force to real-life contexts (biking, soccer, gravity).
language: Produce and use: away from, direction, toward, lean, gravity.
Use toward/away from as an opposite pair when describing movement.
Complete sentences describing direction and force, previewing Grammar 2 definitions with which.
